basics.description: Deploys the Cisco Duo Security (CCF) solution: connector, DCE/DCR/tables, parsers, analytic rules, hunting queries, and workbook. **Deploy the signing proxy first** (signing-proxy/azuredeploy.json) and have its URL + function key ready.

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Microsoft Sentinel workspace name
basics.toolTip: Name of the Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace in this resource group.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid Log Analytics workspace name.

options.text: The connector polls a signing proxy (an Azure Function) that signs Duo Admin API requests. Deploy it first with signing-proxy/azuredeploy.json, then provide its base URL and function key.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter the proxy base URL ending in /api.

elements.name: functionKey
elements.toolTip: Azure Functions key for the signing proxy.
